agent.adapter: three-role separation: Claude planner/reviewer, Codex executor

commands.notes: 0 findings across 1024 tracked files after vendoring from pantheon-harness commit 8010016.

0 findings after fixing 96 false-positive font-weight violations (regex backtracking lesson: negative lookahead after \s* defeated by backtracking, switched to capture + code-side validation) and adding NEUTRAL_HEX exemption for #fff in color-mix().
0 findings across 1024 tracked files. Calibration discovered backend/.golangci.yml hidden-file omission; added to whitelist before landing.

11 of 11 fixture tests pass. One test rewritten to use a distinct basename (dataGrid.tsx instead of tableToolbar.tsx) to avoid the Windows/macOS case-insensitive filesystem trap where a camelCase test file silently merges with an existing PascalCase fixture, making the violation never materialize.

3 of 3 visual baselines verify green (login, dashboard with masked stats, user-list with masked table body). Baselines generated live against running backend on 8080, win32 suffix committed. CI enforcement requires linux baselines first.
Frontend build clean after UI-contract gate wired into prebuild chain (check:shell-visual-contract && check:ui-contract && check:important-budget).
